{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Tower of Winter
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Tower of Winter]] consists of pillars of snow and ice forming a makeshift staircase.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
